## Summary

Describe the change in direct engineering terms.

## Related Issue

Link the related issue.

## Verification

Describe the tests, checks, or manual validation performed.

## Evidence Updated

List any supporting artifacts updated in this repository.

* [ ] Architecture or logic-flow evidence updated if applicable
* [ ] Testing or validation evidence updated if applicable
* [ ] Release or sprint traceability updated if applicable

## Checklist

* [ ] Branch name follows the repository convention
* [ ] Pull request targets the correct branch
* [ ] Related issue is linked
* [ ] Verification steps are documented
* [ ] Supporting docs in `docs/` were updated when required
